name: Chicken in a Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or heavy kettle, brown 2 (2-1/2 lb each) chickens in olive oil until golden brown.
2. Add onion, garlic, salt, and pepper. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Add tomato (or 1/2 cup drained canned tomatoes), and wine. Simmer for another 30 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
